title: The Hellions
writer: Harold Swanton, Patrick Kirwan, Harold Huth
actors: Richard Todd, Anne Aubrey, Jamie Uys
plot: Luke Billings and his four reprobate sons ride into a small South African settlement in search of revenge on Police Sergeant Sam Hargis. Hargis knows he cannot outgun the five outlaws and turns to the townspeople for help. But he ...
